description: Lead has a commercial lease on a property (not the owner) and operates it as a short-term let. Does not own the property. Stayful's model requires owner consent and owner as the contracting party. 100% historical loss rate — all R2R leads except Vishal have abandoned.
historical_loss_note: Every completed R2R engagement has abandoned. Entry 063 Vishal Beeharry is the only currently active R2R lead and is classified high risk.
why_r2r_fails: Stayful contracts with the property owner, not a lessee
Owner consent required for STR — most landlords prohibit it in commercial leases
R2R operator does not have authority to grant STR access
Commercial lease likely has residential subletting restrictions
R2R model creates unresolvable liability chain for Stayful
what_to_do_with_r2r_leads: Clarify the lease situation immediately on first meeting
Check whether the landlord has consented to STR
If landlord not involved, explain Stayful cannot proceed without owner contract
Redirect: can Stayful speak to the actual property owner?
If owner willing to engage directly, convert to standard owner meeting

active_r2r_lead.name: Vishal Beeharry
active_r2r_lead.note: Analytical evaluator. Still active but high risk. Needs landlord consent verification. Track carefully.

lost_r2r_leads.name: Ada
lost_r2r_leads.lost_reason: Commercial lease model incompatible with Stayful owner-management model.

flag_for_review: Any new R2R lead should be flagged immediately to Zac before significant time is invested.
